summary: Full stack testing of Buildrs app. 30 backend API tests all passed. All frontend pages load correctly with session cookie auth. Login page renders well with dark design and Google OAuth button.

integration_issues.issue: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <select> or <option>. Cosmetic/hydration issue from wrapping <option> elements in a <span>. Non-blocking but generates console errors.

action_items: Fix PlanAction.jsx: <option> elements are being wrapped in a <span> by a dynamic renderer, causing React hydration warnings. Review how options are rendered inside the <select> element.
critical_code_review_comments: PlanAction.jsx: <option> elements inside <select> should not be wrapped in span - causes React hydration error (non-critical, cosmetic)
seed_data_creation: Created test user (test-user-1772281738231) and session (test_session_1772281738231) in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session token: test_session_1772281738231. All pages are working. Auth via cookie 'session_token'. Backend 100% passing. Only minor issue is React hydration warning in PlanAction.jsx for option elements inside select.
